The '''Battle of Ord Cantrell''' was a large-scale military engagement during [[Imperial Civil War]] between the [[Crimson Empire]] led by self-proclaimed [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Xandel Carivus]] and [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Ragez D'Asta]] [[D'Asta private fleet|private fleet]] with the support of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==The battle==
[[File:BattleOrdCantrell2.jpg|thumb|left|150px|A temporary ceasefire.]]

With much of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]] dispatched across the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] in the hunt for [[Kir Kanos]], Ord Cantrell was left poorly defended and vulnerable to Baron D'Asta's large private fleet.

The loyalist Imperial forces were soundly defeated in space, losing at least one [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]], and [[D'Astan starfighter|D'Asta's fighters]] began strafing Carivus's estate.

Seeing that defeat was imminent, Carivus offered to release [[Feena D'Asta]]. The Baron was loath to call off the attack when victory was in sight, but he valued his daughter's life over his own pride and agreed to the ceasefire.

==Death of the Emperor==
{{Quote|For your betrayal of the Emperor Palpatine…the penalty is death.|Kir Kanos|<ref name="CEII" />}}
[[File:Carvisdeath.jpg||100px|left|thumb|Emperor Carivus is slain.]]

Aboard his [[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|''Marauder''-class corvette]], D'Asta then learned from Kir Kanos of Carivus's role in the death of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. The two men went to the would-be Emperor's estate to extract their revenge, accompanied by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] agents [[Mirith Sinn]] and [[Tav Kennede]].

Carivus's Guards wounded Kennede, but were unable to stop Kanos from executing the traitorous "Emperor". After the battle, Sinn was unable to convince D'Asta to join the New Republic, and he decided that his [[D'Astan sector/Legends|sector]] would be independent for the time being.
